home.headline: Scalable Android Engineering
home.hero_subtitle: Nam Tran, Senior Android Engineer with over 10 years of experience.

about.title: Hello, I'm Nam.

left_info.title: BIOGRAPHY
info: Work for money and dev for love

left_info.title: CONTACT
info: Ho Chi Minh City, Viet Nam

about.text: My approach to Android engineering is rooted in long-term product thinking. I don't just build features; I architect systems that are maintainable, testable, and resilient to change. With a decade in the industry, I have navigated the evolution of the Android framework—from the early days of Java and Eclipse to the modern era of Kotlin Coroutines and Jetpack Compose.
about.text_short: Specializing in high-performance architectures, clean code modularization, and building robust mobile ecosystems that scale with business logic. Deeply familiar with memory management, reactive patterns, and the modern Android toolset.

experience.description: Technical mentoring, code review, and project guidance.
Maintenance, target SDK updates, and Kotlin app improvements.
Digital banking, NFC, QR flows, and Clean Architecture refactoring.
Streaming, Android TV, ExoPlayer, and team leadership.
Multi-domain client apps with focus on maintainability.
Early-career Android experience in communication and music domains.

projects.name: Lifestyle Plus
projects.description: A sophisticated wellness and rewards platform. Orchestrated real-time wearable data synchronization and complex health gamification logic using heavy-duty background processing.

projects.name: MyTV Net
projects.description: Leading Vietnamese OTT service. Managed the implementation of complex video playback modules for 100+ live channels and low-latency 72h catch-up features.

projects.name: MyTV Phone
projects.description: Leading Vietnamese OTT service. Managed the implementation of complex video playback modules for 100+ live channels and low-latency 72h catch-up features.

projects.name: iCuisto
projects.description: An 'anti-waste' culinary solution featuring smart fridge logic. Integrated Nutri-Score APIs and local notification systems for proactive item expiry management.

projects.name: Pizza Hut Vietnam
projects.description: Engineered a localized delivery ecosystem. Developed complex ordering flows, real-time GPS courier tracking, and seamless integration with regional payment SDKs.
